sentences.arabic: الْمَجْلِسُ غُرْفَةٌ خَاصَّةٌ فِي الْبَيْتِ الْعَرَبِيِّ تُخَصَّصُ لِاسْتِقْبَالِ الضُّيُوفِ.
sentences.translation: Madžlis je posebna prostorija u arapskom domu namijenjena primanju gostiju.
sentences.translationEn: The majlis is a special room in an Arab home dedicated to receiving guests.

sentences.arabic: يَجْلِسُ الرِّجَالُ فِيهِ وَيَتَحَدَّثُونَ عَنِ الْأُمُورِ الْمُهِمَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Muškarci sjede u njoj i razgovaraju o važnim pitanjima.
sentences.translationEn: Men sit there and discuss important matters.

sentences.arabic: تُزَيَّنُ جُدْرَانُ الْمَجْلِسِ بِالسِّجَادِ الْجَمِيلِ وَالْوِسَادِ الْوَثِيرَةِ.
sentences.translation: Zidovi madžlisa ukrašeni su lijepim tepisima i udobnim jastucima.
sentences.translationEn: The walls of the majlis are decorated with beautiful carpets and comfortable cushions.

sentences.arabic: يُقَدِّمُ صَاحِبُ الْبَيْتِ الْقَهْوَةَ وَالتَّمْرَ لِكُلِّ مَنْ يَدْخُلُ الْمَجْلِسَ.
sentences.translation: Domaćin nudi kafu i hurme svakom ko uđe u madžlis.
sentences.translationEn: The host offers coffee and dates to everyone who enters the majlis.
